title: Bridge Essay: Predictive coding and stochastic resonance as fundamental principles of auditory

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent-arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference, Bayesian brain, prediction error in perception and action.

**Predictive coding and stochastic resonance as fundamental principles of auditory phantom perception.** — Brain. PMID: 37503725. DOI: 10.1093/brain/awad255. Mechanistic insight is achieved only when experiments are employed to test formal or computational models. Furthermore, in analogy to lesion studies, phantom perception may serve as avehicle to understand the fundamental processing principles underlying healthy auditory perception. With aspecial focus on tinnitus-as the prime example of auditory phantom perception-we review recent work at the intersection of artificial intelligence, psychology and neuroscience.
